languages.text: "Безумный Навигатор!" {n}Кассия прикрывает руками губы, словно смутившись собственного выкрика.{/n} "Мне доводилось читать о нем и его изысканиях... пускай его считали безумцем, но именно его теоретические выкладки привели к поиску — и обнаружению — безопасного маршрута между Каликсисом и Простором Коронус..."

traits.locale_text: "Безумный Навигатор!" {n}Кассия прикрывает руками губы, словно смутившись собственного выкрика.{/n} "Мне доводилось читать о нем и его изысканиях... пускай его считали безумцем, но именно его теоретические выкладки привели к поиску — и обнаружению — безопасного маршрута между Каликсисом и Простором Коронус..."

languages.text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."
languages.original_text: "Безумный Навигатор!" {n}Кассия прикрывает руками губы, словно смутившись собственного выкрика.{/n} "Мне доводилось читать о нем и его изысканиях... пускай его считали безумцем, но именно его теоретические выкладки привели к поиску — и обнаружению — безопасного маршрута между Каликсисом и Простором Коронус..."

Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

"The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

"The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

languages.text: “疯狂导航者！”{n}卡西娅用双手捂住嘴，像是因为自己突然的惊叫而不好意思。{/n}“我读过关于他和他研究的资料……他被人当作疯子，但正是他的理论，促成了卡利西斯星区与科罗努斯扩区之间安全航路的探索与发现……”
languages.original_text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

traits.locale_text: “疯狂导航者！”{n}卡西娅用双手捂住嘴，像是因为自己突然的惊叫而不好意思。{/n}“我读过关于他和他研究的资料……他被人当作疯子，但正是他的理论，促成了卡利西斯星区与科罗努斯扩区之间安全航路的探索与发现……”

languages.text: «¡El Navegante Loco!». {n}Cassia se tapa la boca, como si se avergonzara de su propia exclamación.{/n} «He leído algo sobre sus investigaciones. Aunque se le considerara un lunático, fueron sus teorías las que condujeron a la búsqueda exitosa de una ruta segura entre el sector Calixis y la Extensión de Koronus...».
languages.original_text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

traits.locale_text: «¡El Navegante Loco!». {n}Cassia se tapa la boca, como si se avergonzara de su propia exclamación.{/n} «He leído algo sobre sus investigaciones. Aunque se le considerara un lunático, fueron sus teorías las que condujeron a la búsqueda exitosa de una ruta segura entre el sector Calixis y la Extensión de Koronus...».

languages.text: « Le Navigateur fou ! » {n}Cassia plaque les mains sur sa bouche, comme embarrassée par son propre éclat.{/n} « J'ai lu des choses à propos de lui et de ses recherches... On le considérait comme dément, mais c'est son travail qui a conduit à la recherche – et à la découverte – d'un itinéraire sûr entre le secteur Calixis et les Étendues de Koronus... »
languages.original_text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

traits.locale_text: « Le Navigateur fou ! » {n}Cassia plaque les mains sur sa bouche, comme embarrassée par son propre éclat.{/n} « J'ai lu des choses à propos de lui et de ses recherches... On le considérait comme dément, mais c'est son travail qui a conduit à la recherche – et à la découverte – d'un itinéraire sûr entre le secteur Calixis et les Étendues de Koronus... »

languages.text: "Deli Rotacı!" {n}Cassia, kendi çığlığından utanmış gibi elleriyle ağzını kapatıyor.{/n} "Onu ve araştırmalarını okumuştum... Deli görülse de Calixis Sektörü ile Koronus Enginliği arasında güvenli bir rotanın aranmasına ve bulunmasına yol açan onun teorileriydi..."
languages.original_text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

traits.locale_text: "Deli Rotacı!" {n}Cassia, kendi çığlığından utanmış gibi elleriyle ağzını kapatıyor.{/n} "Onu ve araştırmalarını okumuştum... Deli görülse de Calixis Sektörü ile Koronus Enginliği arasında güvenli bir rotanın aranmasına ve bulunmasına yol açan onun teorileriydi..."

languages.text: "Der verrückte Navigator!" {n}Cassia hält sich angesichts ihres Aufschreis peinlich berührt die Hand vor den Mund.{/n} "Ich habe von ihm und seiner Forschung gelesen ... Obwohl er als verrückt galt, waren es seine Theorien, die zur Suche – und Entdeckung – einer sicheren Route zwischen dem Calixis-Sektor und der Koronus-Ausdehnung führten ..."
languages.original_text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

traits.locale_text: "Der verrückte Navigator!" {n}Cassia hält sich angesichts ihres Aufschreis peinlich berührt die Hand vor den Mund.{/n} "Ich habe von ihm und seiner Forschung gelesen ... Obwohl er als verrückt galt, waren es seine Theorien, die zur Suche – und Entdeckung – einer sicheren Route zwischen dem Calixis-Sektor und der Koronus-Ausdehnung führten ..."

languages.text: 「狂った航海士！」{n}カシアは自分の叫びに恥ずかしそうに口を手で覆う。{/n}「彼と彼の研究について、私は読んだことがある…彼は狂人だと見なされたが、彼の理論がカリキス・セクターとコロナス・エクスパンス間の安全な航路の探索と発見につながったのだ…」
languages.original_text: "The Mad Navigator!" {n}Cassia covers her mouth with her hands, as if embarrassed by her own outcry.{/n} "I have read about him and his research... Though he was deemed a madman, it was his theorising that led to the search for — and discovery of — a safe route between the Calixis Sector and the Koronus Expanse..."

traits.locale_text: 「狂った航海士！」{n}カシアは自分の叫びに恥ずかしそうに口を手で覆う。{/n}「彼と彼の研究について、私は読んだことがある…彼は狂人だと見なされたが、彼の理論がカリキス・セクターとコロナス・エクスパンス間の安全な航路の探索と発見につながったのだ…」
